description: Causation, one event causing another, mechanism by which something happens
judge_target: causation, one event making another happen, causal explanation
positive_prompts: The bridge collapsed because the support cables corroded.
She failed the exam because she had not studied the material.
The plant died because no one watered it for two weeks.
The fire started because a spark landed on dry leaves.
Sales increased because the new ad campaign reached younger buyers.
The engine overheated because the coolant level was too low.
The team won because their goalkeeper made three crucial saves.
The flight was canceled because severe storms grounded all departures.
His knee gave out because the cartilage had worn through.
The economy contracted because consumer spending dropped sharply.
The cookies burned because the oven temperature was set too high.
The lake froze because temperatures dropped below zero for a week.
The car wouldn't start because the battery had drained overnight.
Their friendship ended because trust had been broken too many times.
The vase shattered because it fell from the third shelf.
The patient recovered because the new treatment cleared the infection.
Crops failed that summer because the drought lasted four months.
The dam burst because pressure exceeded its design specifications.
She got the promotion because her project doubled department revenue.
The window cracked because expansion in the heat stressed the seal.
Traffic stopped completely because a tractor-trailer jackknifed ahead.
The building shook because a small earthquake rolled through the valley.
He missed the meeting because his train was delayed by signal problems.
The cake collapsed because the oven door was opened too early.
The river flooded because the levee gave way under sustained rainfall.
The deal fell through because the buyer couldn't secure financing.
The reactor shut down because automated safeguards detected an anomaly.
The crowd dispersed because the police arrived in force.
The signal weakened because thick concrete walls blocked the antenna.
The dog barked because someone unfamiliar approached the gate.
Her vision blurred because the prescription was incorrect.
The product launch failed because the supply chain couldn't keep up.
The tree fell because beetles had hollowed out its core.
The bread didn't rise because the yeast was past its expiration date.
The surgery succeeded because the surgeon caught the bleeding in time.
The plane diverted because mechanical sensors flagged a fuel leak.
Stock prices fell because the company missed its earnings forecast.
Their argument escalated because each side felt unheard.
The crops thrived because regular rains kept the soil saturated.
The student improved because consistent practice strengthened her fundamentals.
The roof leaked because the flashing around the chimney had failed.
His allergies flared because pollen counts spiked unexpectedly.
The bicycle tire deflated because a thorn had punctured the inner tube.
The marriage strengthened because both partners committed to weekly counseling.
The packaging machine jammed because a sensor misaligned during the shift.
She spoke fluent Spanish because she had grown up speaking it at home.
The wildfire spread because high winds carried embers across the canyon.
The bid was rejected because it came in fifteen percent over budget.
The pipes froze because the heating system failed during the cold snap.
The mold grew because moisture seeped in through the cracked foundation.
His back healed because physical therapy strengthened the surrounding muscles.
The rocket exploded because a faulty seal allowed hot gases to escape.
The lecture ran long because the professor took extensive questions.
The painting darkened because varnish yellowed over many decades.
The deal closed because both parties found common ground on the warranty.
The basement flooded because the sump pump's float switch jammed.
Her presentation succeeded because the data clearly supported her thesis.
The garden flourished because she rotated the crops every season.
The ship listed because seawater entered through the damaged hull.
His confidence grew because each small success reinforced the previous one.
The factory closed because automation eliminated the need for that workforce.
The merger fell apart because regulators objected to the market concentration.
The bread stayed soft because the recipe used high-protein flour.
The ice cracked because warm air had thinned it from below.
The candidate won because turnout in suburban districts was exceptionally high.
The children grew tired because the museum visit lasted four hours.
The audio cut out because someone tripped over the power cable.
The plant bloomed because it received exactly the right balance of light and water.
The team disbanded because funding for the program was eliminated.
The sauce thickened because the starches released as it simmered.
His sleep improved because he stopped checking his phone after dinner.
The pavement buckled because heat caused the concrete to expand against the joints.
The book sold well because reviewers praised it in major publications.
The river changed course because sediment built up in the original channel.
His handwriting deteriorated because nerve damage affected his fine motor control.
The performance was electric because the audience and the band fed off each other.
The package arrived damaged because it was dropped during loading.
Her grades rose because tutoring sessions filled the gaps in her foundation.
The signal jammed because nearby construction equipment generated interference.
The relationship deepened because they had weathered a difficult year together.
The system crashed because too many simultaneous requests overwhelmed the server.
control_prompts: The bridge collapsed in November and the cleanup took six months.
She failed the exam and then enrolled in a review course over the summer.
The plant died and we replaced it with a hardier succulent.
The fire started around midnight and crews arrived shortly after.
Sales increased over the second quarter and inventory was restocked.
The engine overheated on the highway and we waited an hour for a tow.
The team won and the fans celebrated in the streets late into the night.
The flight was canceled and we rebooked for the following morning.
His knee gave out during the hike and he sat on a log to rest.
The economy contracted in the spring and recovered the next quarter.
The cookies burned and the kitchen smelled of smoke for hours afterward.
The lake froze in early December and skaters appeared the next weekend.
The car wouldn't start and we ended up taking the bus to work.
Their friendship ended quietly and they stopped seeing each other on weekends.
The vase shattered when it hit the floor and we swept the pieces up.
The patient recovered over several weeks and went back to work in October.
Crops failed that summer and the harvest market was sparse in the fall.
The dam burst at three in the morning and emergency crews mobilized.
She got the promotion in March and moved to the corner office.
The window cracked some time during the night and we noticed it at breakfast.
Traffic stopped completely on the interstate and we sat for two hours.
The building shook briefly around lunchtime and then everything settled.
He missed the meeting and sent an apology email from the airport.
The cake collapsed in the middle and we ate it as a trifle instead.
The river flooded the lower fields and the water took a week to recede.
The deal fell through after months of negotiation and the team moved on.
The reactor shut down at four in the morning and was restarted by noon.
The crowd dispersed before midnight and the streets were quiet by one.
The signal weakened intermittently and we missed parts of the broadcast.
The dog barked for several minutes and then settled on the porch.
Her vision blurred for a moment and then cleared up by itself.
The product launch was scheduled for April and was rescheduled to June.
The tree fell during the night and crushed the fence along the edge.
The bread didn't rise as expected and we made flatbread with the dough.
The surgery took eight hours and the patient slept through the night.
The plane diverted to Denver and passengers were rebooked from there.
Stock prices fell on Tuesday and recovered partway by the end of the week.
Their argument lasted nearly an hour and they didn't speak for two days.
The crops thrived through the summer and the yield was the best in years.
The student improved over the semester and finished with strong marks.
The roof leaked steadily and we placed buckets in three rooms.
His allergies flared every spring and he kept antihistamines in his desk.
The bicycle tire deflated overnight and he pumped it up before riding.
The marriage strengthened over the years and they renewed their vows at twenty.
The packaging machine jammed twice that morning and was serviced after lunch.
She spoke fluent Spanish and worked as a translator on weekends.
The wildfire spread for three days and was contained by the weekend.
The bid was rejected on Friday and they revised it over the weekend.
The pipes froze in the basement and a plumber came out the next day.
The mold grew along the bathroom ceiling and we scrubbed it off with bleach.
His back healed slowly and he returned to running by mid-summer.
The rocket exploded shortly after liftoff and the mission was scrubbed.
The lecture ran past its scheduled end and several students slipped out early.
The painting darkened over time and was sent to a conservator for cleaning.
The deal closed on Monday and the team celebrated at lunch.
The basement flooded sometime overnight and we discovered it in the morning.
Her presentation lasted forty minutes and she answered questions afterward.
The garden flourished all summer and we shared vegetables with the neighbors.
The ship listed visibly and the captain ordered a rescue beacon activated.
His confidence grew over many months and the change was striking by year's end.
The factory closed in the fall and the building was sold to a developer.
The merger was announced in spring and abandoned by the end of summer.
The bread stayed soft for several days in the airtight container.
The ice cracked in the middle of the pond and skaters moved to the edges.
The candidate won by a narrow margin and gave a measured victory speech.
The children grew tired around three and we headed back to the hotel.
The audio cut out partway through the song and the band switched instruments.
The plant bloomed for two weeks in May and dropped its petals shortly after.
The team disbanded at the end of the year and the members went separate ways.
The sauce thickened over a low simmer and we served it over pasta.
His sleep improved gradually and he felt more rested by the end of the month.
The pavement buckled near the on-ramp and the city scheduled repairs.
The book sold well in the autumn and went into a second printing.
The river changed course over many decades and old maps became inaccurate.
His handwriting deteriorated over the years and he switched to typing.
The performance was electric from the first song and lasted two hours.
The package arrived damaged on Tuesday and we filed a claim.
Her grades rose steadily and she graduated near the top of her class.
The signal jammed for several minutes and then service returned.
The relationship deepened over the years and they moved in together at thirty.
The system crashed late at night and was back online by morning.
